description:
Gate on epic bl-a847. Not meant to close before the epic — gates link, not a dep.

Update README.md:
- Replace any example output blocks that show [P3] bl-xxxx status ... with the new grouped/glyphed format.
- Add a short 'CLI look and feel' section explaining: glyphs + words, priority dots, claimed/deps/gates badges, tree rendering for bl dep tree, epic progress bars.
- Document --plain, and the NO_COLOR / CLICOLOR / isatty detection order.
- Note that --json output is unchanged (machine contract).

Update SKILL.md:
- Don't lean on glyph-only understanding (agents parse text). Keep the prose skill-facing, and add a one-line note that bl supports --plain for stable output when scraping human output is unavoidable (but --json is still the supported contract).

Update clap help strings:
- Any --help output showing example formats.
- Add --plain to the top-level Cli.

Acceptance:
- README examples render correctly copy-pasted from a real terminal run.
- SKILL.md parseable contract unchanged.
- bl --help mentions --plain.
title: Docs update for CLI display overhaul: README, SKILL.md, help strings
